nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Approval
nodes.notes: Approval dashboard POSTs here with {post_id, action: 'approve'|'reject', scheduled_at?}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Immediately returns 200 so the dashboard doesn't wait

nodes.name: Is Approved?
nodes.notes: Only proceed if action is 'approve'. Rejects go to No Op.

nodes.name: Supabase: Fetch + Update Approved
nodes.notes: Updates status to approved and returns full post row

nodes.name: Wait: Until Scheduled Time
nodes.notes: Pauses execution until the calculated optimal posting time. n8n resumes automatically.

nodes.name: LinkedIn: Publish Post
nodes.notes: Set LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN and LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID in env vars. Get Person ID from LinkedIn API: GET https://api.linkedin.com/v2/me

nodes.name: Instagram: Create Media Container
nodes.notes: Step 1 of 2 for Instagram. Creates a media container, returns a creation_id. Set INSTAGRAM_USER_ID and INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN.

nodes.name: Instagram: Publish Container
nodes.notes: Step 2 of 2. Publishes the container created in previous step. Returns the post ID.

nodes.name: WhatsApp: Send to Community
nodes.notes: Uses existing WhatsApp Business API. Set WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID, WHATSAPP_TOKEN, WHATSAPP_COMMUNITY_NUMBER in env vars. This matches lib/whatsapp/ already in Planora.

nodes.name: Wait: 48 Hours for Analytics
nodes.notes: Waits 48 hours, then pulls performance data from LinkedIn + Instagram APIs

nodes.name: LinkedIn: Get Analytics
nodes.notes: Pulls likes, comments, shares, impressions for the post. Uses LinkedIn v2 Social Actions API.

nodes.name: Instagram: Get Insights
nodes.notes: Pulls engagement metrics from Meta Insights API for the published post

nodes.name: Claude: Generate Insight Note
nodes.notes: Optional but powerful: Claude explains why the post performed the way it did, feeding next week's strategy
